globalFindings.semanticConclusion: numeric validators are supported by parser/temp config and many companion examples, but row-specific official bounds, integer/float semantics, percent units, and finite numeric choices are not exhaustively proven for the broad bucket.
globalFindings.riskPattern: current app validators may accept finite numeric shapes beyond what row-level source evidence currently proves; this sprint records repair candidates only.
globalFindings.recommendedPolicy: Prompt 3 should reconcile each broad numeric validator with official source/schema min/max/type and only then narrow, normalize, or document parser-compatible forms.
